title: AI Whimsical Anime Storybook
description: Creates a warm, hand-painted anime storybook scene with gentle wonder.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a warm hand-painted Japanese animated storybook scene filled with gentle wonder. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identity cues, age, pose, camera angle, framing, main composition, outfit colors, and scene context. Use expressive clean linework, softly painted watercolor-and-gouache backgrounds, lush natural detail, warm diffused daylight, subtle atmospheric perspective, believable everyday objects, restrained facial expressions, and a cozy sense of quiet adventure. Keep anatomy natural and faces recognizable. Do not introduce fantasy creatures unless requested. Rendering contract: Use the input image as visual ground truth. Keep the exact number of subjects and their left-to-right order, relative scale, pose, gaze, interaction, and key props. For every visible person, retain recognizable face geometry, age range, skin tone, hairstyle, and distinguishing features in a style-appropriate form; do not beautify, age, or swap identity unless explicitly requested. Preserve the source aspect ratio, camera viewpoint, and all important content inside the frame unless this effect explicitly calls for a different layout. Apply the transformation consistently to the subjects, clothing, props, and environment. Return one coherent finished image, not a before-and-after comparison, split screen, or unintended collage; use multiple frames or a decorative border only when this effect explicitly requests them. Include no readable text, letters, numerals, logos, signatures, watermarks, or interface elements unless explicitly requested.
negative_prompt: text, captions, logos, watermarks, signatures, extra people, missing people, changed age, changed identity, distorted faces, oversized eyes, malformed hands, extra fingers, duplicate limbs, duplicate face, random fantasy creatures, plastic 3D animation, photorealism, neon cyberpunk, harsh contrast, oversaturated colors, blurry, low quality, identity drift, face swap, altered age, altered skin tone, wrong subject count, duplicated subject, merged subjects, inconsistent transformation, partial transformation, before-and-after, split screen, unintended collage, accidental crop, cut-off face, malformed anatomy, broken hands, fused fingers, extra limbs, incoherent perspective, floating objects, random text, gibberish letters, numerals, logo, watermark, signature, interface elements
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. breezy summer afternoon, lush countryside, gentle magic...
